svg.text: Enterprise AI Copilot for Legacy Systems
Private cloud · Domain fine-tuned LLM · RAG + Knowledge Graph · Controlled web search · Zero data exposure
Analyze · Explain · Document · Modernize · Debug · Impact Analysis · Business Logic Extraction
No public AI APIs · Your data stays private
🔒 PRIVATE CLOUD BOUNDARY — ALL LEGACY CODE · EMBEDDINGS · BUSINESS DATA NEVER LEAVES THIS ENVIRONMENT
Enterprise Team · Secure HTTPS · Custom Domain URL
Single Sign-On (SSO) · Multi-Factor Auth · Role-Based Access · IP Allowlist
Team-only access · Session isolation · Audit logging · Zero-trust verification
🌐 Secure Web Gateway — Single entry point · No direct access to AI or data
Conversational Chat UI · Streaming Token Display · Code Viewer · Session History
Cloud-native · Auto-scale to zero · Pay-per-use · Multi-tenant
Routes to AI, RAG, or Search
Private GPU VM · No external AI calls
All vectors stay inside private cloud · no API calls
Isolated search subnet · No internal data sent
Controlled egress · Results return as plain text
Only SEARCH QUERY leaves VNet · Code/data stays inside
WHAT THE AI CAN DO WITH YOUR LEGACY CODE
🎫 Ticketing System · 📋 Knowledge Wiki · 🐙 Version Control · 📦 CI/CD Pipeline
Read-only API tokens · Org-specific endpoints · No external data sharing
☁ Private Knowledge Store (Encrypted · No public endpoint)
📁 Legacy Source Files · 📄 Schema Definitions · 📖 Syntax References · 🧠 Embeddings · 🔗 Dep. Graph
Auto-synced on every commit · RAG index rebuilt automatically · Private blob storage
✅ Your model, your GPU, your VNet · 🔒 All data encrypted at rest + in transit · 🔐 Zero-trust auth on every request
Fine-tuned LLM runs on private GPU VM · Embeddings computed internally · Web search is query-only (no internal data leaves) · NSG rules block all unintended egress
